title: anthemis saxatilis var. macrocephala
intro: Anthemis saxatilis var. macrocephala, also known as mountain chamomile, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality due to its calming effects. The herbal preparations of mountain chamomile include tea infusions, essential oil extracts, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
